text_raw: Fuck it, if you need me, I'll be by the kegs.
text_clean: Fuck it, if you need me, I'll be by the kegs.

text_raw: Kliff... By the ancestors... It's good to have you back with us...
text_clean: Kliff... By the ancestors... It's good to have you back with us...

text_raw: Fuck's sake, you mad bastard... shut it and walk!
text_clean: Fuck's sake, you mad bastard... shut it and walk!

text_raw: Now we've earned a peaceful meal.
text_clean: Now we've earned a peaceful meal.

text_raw: Wow. So this is our new home!
text_clean: Wow. So this is our new home!

text_raw: I hunted Black Bears my whole way here!
text_clean: I hunted Black Bears my whole way here!

text_raw: The Reed Devil was bloody terrifying!
text_clean: The Reed Devil was bloody terrifying!

text_raw: Kliff! Don't you want a real, steaming bowl of stew?
text_clean: Kliff! Don't you want a real, steaming bowl of stew?

text_raw: I didn't get to tell you about Halssius yet!
text_clean: I didn't get to tell you about Halssius yet!

text_raw: Ugh... You sure he didn't get his brain scrambled?
text_clean: Ugh... You sure he didn't get his brain scrambled?

text_raw: No, we're the ones who should be thanking you.
text_clean: No, we're the ones who should be thanking you.

text_raw: He's probably off drinking again, no doubt.
text_clean: He's probably off drinking again, no doubt.

text_raw: Yeah, yeah. Don't worry about me. How did you get here?
text_clean: Yeah, yeah. Don't worry about me. How did you get here?

text_raw: This is what it means to be a Greymane.
text_clean: This is what it means to be a Greymane.

text_raw: It's been far too long since I've had this feeling!
text_clean: It's been far too long since I've had this feeling!

text_raw: I knew the Greymanes couldn't be ended so easily!
text_clean: I knew the Greymanes couldn't be ended so easily!

text_raw: I didn't let him though, heh!
text_clean: I didn't let him though, heh!

text_raw: You've got time to talk, don't you?
text_clean: You've got time to talk, don't you?
